result: Critical UX bug sweep completed. Fixed: (1) Removed unused FeaturesPage import from Routes.tsx, (2) Added missing /dashboard route alias so login redirect works, (3) Added /support and /templates routes with Help and TaskTemplates pages, (4) Fixed useAuth.ts redirect from /dashboard to / for login and signup flows, (5) Fixed ghlContacts.service.ts import casing (getGhlService -> getGHLService, GhlApiResponse -> GHLApiResponse) that caused server build failure. All core pages verified: Dashboard, Agent Dashboard, Training (6 tabs), Settings, Workflow Builder, Browser Sessions, Scheduled Tasks, Lead Lists, AI Campaigns, Credits, Quizzes, Admin pages. No broken imports or missing components found. Build passes cleanly. Navigation/sidebar works correctly with Wouter routing.
